'''zoshathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:focometric|focometric]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focometric|focometric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zoshathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zoshathithi|zoshathithi]] || [[word:zoshathiji|zoshathiji]] || [[word:zoshathishi|zoshathishi]] || [[word:zoshathiki|zoshathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zoshathuthuthu|zoshathuthuthu]] || [[word:zoshathujuju|zoshathujuju]] || [[word:zoshathushushu|zoshathushushu]] || [[word:zoshathukuku|zoshathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zoshathuthu|zoshathuthu]] || [[word:zoshathuju|zoshathuju]] || [[word:zoshathushu|zoshathushu]] || [[word:zoshathuku|zoshathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zoshathufthuf|zoshathufthuf]] || [[word:zoshathufjuf|zoshathufjuf]] || [[word:zoshathufshuf|zoshathufshuf]] || [[word:zoshathufkuf|zoshathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zoshathethe|zoshathethe]] || [[word:zoshatheje|zoshatheje]] || [[word:zoshatheshe|zoshatheshe]] || [[word:zoshatheke|zoshatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zoshathothotho|zoshathothotho]] || [[word:zoshathojojo|zoshathojojo]] || [[word:zoshathoshosho|zoshathoshosho]] || [[word:zoshathokoko|zoshathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zoshathotho|zoshathotho]] || [[word:zoshathojo|zoshathojo]] || [[word:zoshathosho|zoshathosho]] || [[word:zoshathoko|zoshathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zoshathofthof|zoshathofthof]] || [[word:zoshathofjof|zoshathofjof]] || [[word:zoshathofshof|zoshathofshof]] || [[word:zoshathofkof|zoshathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfthĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfjĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfshĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfkĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfthĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfjĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfshĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfkĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfthĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfjĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfshĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zoshathĂŻfkĂŻf|zoshathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zoshathĂŠthĂŠ|zoshathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zoshathĂŠjĂŠ|zoshathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zoshathĂŠshĂŠ|zoshathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zoshathĂŠkĂŠ|zoshathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zoshathathatha|zoshathathatha]] || [[word:zoshathajaja|zoshathajaja]] || [[word:zoshathashasha|zoshathashasha]] || [[word:zoshathakaka|zoshathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zoshathatha|zoshathatha]] || [[word:zoshathaja|zoshathaja]] || [[word:zoshathasha|zoshathasha]] || [[word:zoshathaka|zoshathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zoshathafthaf|zoshathafthaf]] || [[word:zoshathafjaf|zoshathafjaf]] || [[word:zoshathafshaf|zoshathafshaf]] || [[word:zoshathafkaf|zoshathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zoshathasha|zoshathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zoshathshĂ«sha|zoshathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zoshathrosha|zoshathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zoshathmusha|zoshathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zoshathyasha|zoshathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozoshathnkshĂ«sha|gozoshathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozoshathnkrosha|gozoshathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozoshathnkmusha|gozoshathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozoshathnkyasha|gozoshathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zoshashathasha|zoshashathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zoshashathshĂ«sha|zoshashathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zoshashathrosha|zoshashathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zoshashathmusha|zoshashathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zoshashathyasha|zoshashathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozoshashathnkshĂ«sha|gozoshashathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozoshashathnkrosha|gozoshashathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozoshashathnkmusha|gozoshashathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozoshashathnkyasha|gozoshashathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zeshĂŠthasha|zeshĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zeshĂŠthshĂ«sha|zeshĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zeshĂŠthrosha|zeshĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zeshĂŠthmusha|zeshĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zeshĂŠthyasha|zeshĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozeshĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|gozeshĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozeshĂŠthnkrosha|gozeshĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozeshĂŠthnkmusha|gozeshĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozeshĂŠthnkyasha|gozeshĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zoshfathasha|zoshfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zoshfathshĂ«sha|zoshfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zoshfathrosha|zoshfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zoshfathmusha|zoshfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zoshfathyasha|zoshfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozoshfathnkshĂ«sha|gozoshfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozoshfathnkrosha|gozoshfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozoshfathnkmusha|gozoshfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozoshfathnkyasha|gozoshfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
